overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a player character exploring the Gatefront Ruins, a medieval castle ruin area with stone pathways, scattered wooden carts, and enemy soldiers. The character walks through the overcast environment with floating red embers, passing through archways and camps.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone path leading to castle gate through grassy ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone path toward the castle gate

notable_agents.action: enemy soldier sitting on a wooden cart watching the path

entered.detail: large medieval stone gate with two cylindrical towers and an arched entrance
crumbling stone walls and broken pillars covered in moss
broken wooden wagons with scattered wheels and debris
irregular stone slab pathway leading toward the gate

segments.scene_description: The player character walks along a stone path through tall grass toward a large castle gate. Broken wooden carts and crumbling stone ruins line the path while an enemy soldier sits atop a cart to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gatefront Ruins entrance with enemy patrol

events.description: location text 'Gatefront Ruins' appears on screen

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the first enemy soldier toward the archway entrance

notable_agents.action: armored enemy soldier standing guard with shield and spear

entered.detail: stone archway entrance through the thick ruin walls

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the Gatefront Ruins entrance, passing a standing enemy soldier with a shield. The stone archway becomes visible ahead as the location name appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: enemy camp with canvas tents and supply caches

events.description: passes through stone archway into the enclosed camp area
approaches torch-bearing enemy standing near a dead wolf carcass

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously through the camp, approaching an enemy near a dead animal

notable_agents.action: enemy soldier holding a lit torch, standing over a dead wolf

entered.detail: weathered brown canvas tents supported by wooden poles
large clay storage jars grouped near the tents
carcass of a large grey wolf lying on the muddy ground

segments.scene_description: Passing through the archway into an enclosed camp area with canvas tents and clay pots, the character encounters an enemy soldier holding a torch near a dead wolf. The environment shifts from open path to sheltered camp with mixed lighting from the flames.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland outside the ruins with autumn foliage

events.description: exits the camp through a stone archway into open grassland

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through tall grass away from the ruins toward the tree line

entered.detail: trees with orange and yellow autumn foliage on the hillside
dense green leafy bushes lining the path

segments.scene_description: Exiting the camp through another archway, the character enters open grassland with dense vegetation and autumn-colored trees. The castle gate becomes visible in the distance to the right as the character ascends the hill.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning to the camp area with scattered wagons and tents

events.description: re-enters the camp area from the hillside path

agents.ego_description: descending back into the camp, approaching another enemy soldier on the path ahead

notable_agents.action: enemy soldier walking along the path ahead toward the character

entered.detail: broken wooden wagons with large wheels blocking the path side

segments.scene_description: The character descends back into the camp area, passing wooden carts and approaching an enemy soldier walking along the path. The castle gate comes back into view ahead as the character moves through the semi-enclosed camp space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate ruin that transitions from an open stone path into a sheltered military camp and back out into the surrounding grasslands. It begins with the character walking along a stone path lined with broken wooden carts and crumbling ruins, passing a soldier perched atop a cart. As the character approaches the Gatefront Ruins entrance, the scene shifts through a stone archway into an enclosed camp filled with canvas tents and the flickering light of a soldier's torch. The camera then follows the character out through another archway into open grassland with autumn-colored trees and a distant castle gate before turning back toward the camp. Finally, the character descends back into the semi-enclosed camp space, passing wooden carts and a patrolling soldier as the castle gate looms ahead.
